text.title: Backup Strategies (3-2-1-1-0) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workload have persistent state worth recovering?

conclusion.verdict: Rely on IaC rebuild; no backup spec needed.
PITR + 3-2-1-1-0 with hourly snapshots + immutable nightly dump
3-2-1-1-0 with daily snapshots + immutable weekly archive

text.example: persistent_state=true → rpo<=1h → PITR + 3-2-1-1-0 hourly. References rule 3-2-1-1-0-rule.
